imagery.composition: bold foreground subject, authentic environment backgrounds

target_audience.profession: Australian workers in low-to-mid wage jobs seeking FIFO mining careers
pain_points: stuck in $50k-$70k/yr jobs with no clear path out
don't know how to get into FIFO without experience
afraid of failing the pre-employment medical or drug test
no idea what to say in a FIFO interview
don't know which companies are actually hiring
aspirations: $100k-$150k+ salary working 2 weeks on, 1 week off
pay off mortgage faster and support their family
get out of the city grind or low-paying trade work
travel and see outback Australia while earning big

offer.format: Online self-paced modules, documents, and quizzes
offer.transformation: Go from zero FIFO experience to job-ready with a polished resume, interview answers, and full pre-employment preparation
offer.urgency_angle: Companies are hiring now — be ready before the next intake
